category_sources: Official t1lib homepage describes t1lib as an open source C library for rasterizing Adobe Type 1 fonts.
source_facts.description says it is a C library to generate/rasterize bitmaps from Type 1 fonts.
display_name_sources: Official homepage identifies the project as t1lib.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official t1lib site and best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: Official t1lib homepage lists source distribution via FTP/tarball but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official homepage notes X11 rasterizer heritage and independence from GUI systems.
source_facts.description identifies Type 1 font bitmap generation/rasterization in C.
